name: Skuad Global EOR & Payroll API
what_it_does: Singapore-based global Employer of Record (EOR) and contractor management platform covering 160+ countries — with strong Asia-Pacific coverage, IP protection addendums, and REST API for HRIS integration for companies hiring remote teams across time zones.
use_cases: Hiring full-time employees in Asia-Pacific countries without local entity via EOR API
Managing contractor payments across 160+ countries from a single API integration
Syncing Skuad employee data with HRIS systems for global workforce visibility
Adding IP protection clauses to contracts via API for tech company hiring
Querying multi-country payroll costs for distributed team financial planning
not_for: European-focused hiring (competitors like Lano or PayFit have stronger EU coverage)
Enterprise requiring dedicated country employment specialists
Teams needing fully self-serve API without sales engagement
best_when: A tech company hiring remote teams in Asia-Pacific or emerging markets wants EOR with IP protection addendums and API integration for HRIS sync.
avoid_when: You primarily hire in Europe, need enterprise premium support, or want self-serve API access.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for HRIS integration. Bearer token auth. API access via partner/enterprise plan. No fine-grained scopes. Webhook support for employment lifecycle events.

pricing.notes: Competitive EOR pricing. Singapore-based company. Backed by Beenext and Anthemis. Strong Asia-Pacific coverage. IP protection addendum differentiator for tech companies. 160+ countries. API via partnership. Good BambooHR and Workday integration.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for employee and contractor management, payroll, and compliance. OAuth2 for HRIS integration. Webhook support for lifecycle events. API documentation developing — less comprehensive than Deel or Remote. APAC timezone support important for scheduling.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Employee reads idempotent. Contract creation sequential with legal review. Payroll queries idempotent. Contractor payment operations not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Singapore-based — APAC time zones are primary for support
IP protection addendum requires manual review — not fully automatable
API documentation less mature than larger EOR competitors
Country-specific data requirements vary significantly across 160+ countries

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. Singapore data residency primary with US/EU available. OAuth2 for integrations. Employee PII handled per local data protection laws.
